---
title: "about_page_1"
author: "Edward"
date: "2026-03-04"
output: html_document
---

The **_GAM-MAP_** addresses the following objectives:

<div style="color:green; ">
1. Dynamic Analysis
</div>
Explore regional patterns and trends in uncomplicated malaria cases and climatic variables over time

<div style="color:green; margin-top:10px;">
2. Regional Insights 
</div>
Analyse data at the regional level in Ghana to understand variations in malaria burden and climate drivers across different areas.

<div style="color:green; margin-top:10px;">
3. Modeling Techniques
</div>
Apply advanced statistical models, specifically <b>GAMs</b>, to examine nonlinear relationships between climate variables and malaria cases, and to evaluate the contribution of individual and combined climatic factors to malaria burden.
